## Summary

- Describe what changed.
- Link related issues/tasks.

## Product Impact (required)

- User-facing impact:
- Business/operational impact:
- Risk level (low/medium/high) and why:

## Persona-Rule Impact (required)

- Persona logic changed? (yes/no):
- If yes, describe changes and impacted personas:
- Confirm strict overrides unchanged unless explicitly intended:
  - [ ] No smartphone => Persona 3
  - [ ] No bank account => Persona 3

## Prompt / Schema Changes (required)

- Analysis prompt changed? (yes/no):
- Structured output schema changed? (yes/no):
- If yes, list affected files and compatibility notes:

## Validation

- Describe tests/checks run locally.

## Documentation Updated (required)

Mark all that apply:

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] TASKS.md
- [ ] DECISIONS.md
- [ ] context/product.md
- [ ] context/research_rules.md
- [ ] prompts/analysis_prompt.md
- [ ] Not needed (explain why)

## Migration / Deployment Notes (required)

- Data migration required? (yes/no):
- Backfill required? (yes/no):
- Deployment steps / order:
- Rollback plan:
- Monitoring/alerts to watch after deploy:

## UI checklist (required for UI-impacting PRs)

If this PR changes Streamlit UI behavior, complete the checklist in:

- `docs/ui_pr_checklist.md`

Copy the checklist into this PR description and mark each item before requesting review.
